<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few things to make the review fast:
- Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR.
- For user-visible changes, add a CHANGELOG entry under ## [Unreleased].
- For UI changes, attach a before/after screenshot or short recording.
-->

## What's changing?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation. Link any related issue: "Fixes #123" / "Refs #456". -->

## How did you test it?

<!-- Steps you ran in the side panel against a real D365 environment. -->

- [ ] Loaded the unpacked extension in Chrome.
- [ ] Verified the change behaves as expected.
- [ ] Checked the side-panel console for new errors.

## Checklist

- [ ] Manifest version was **not** bumped in this PR (releases are tagged separately).
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `## [Unreleased]` if this is user-visible.
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or, if there are, they're justified in the description).
